title: The alumacc pass does not preserve attributes

features.name: attribute on addition operator operand
features.description: Code should include an addition operator with an attribute attached to one of its operands in a binary expression

features.name: chained addition operations to alu cell
features.description: Code should include chained addition operators that the alumacc pass maps to a $alu cell, where attributes on the original operators should be preserved

features.name: attribute construct on operator
features.description: Code should include the SystemVerilog attribute syntax applied to a binary arithmetic operator to test attribute preservation through synthesis passes
